meaning: 科索沃[南斯拉夫自治省名]
examples: The victims were believed to be Albanians from either Albania or Kosovo, said authorities from Italy's tax police division, which, along with the coast guard, patrols the nation's coast.
Troops are needed to help get food into Kosovo where people are in desperate need.
Mr Sarkozy will stress that France has already commanded NATO missions in Kosovo and Afghanistan.
Five of the 27 EU countries do not recognise Kosovo: Spain, Greece, Romania, Slovakia and Cyprus.
